---
title: "Figure S3"
author: "Phil Zhou"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r load_packages}
library(svglite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(gplots)
library(zoo)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r load_dfs}
#FigS3_LDLR-FL RPM table
LDLR_FL_RPM_table <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_FL", "FigS3_LDLR-FL RPM table.csv"))

#FigS3_LDLR137vsFL_BEANmuZ
LDLR137vsFL_BEANmuZ <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_FL", "FigS3_LDLR137vsFL_BEANmuZ.csv"))

#FigS3_LDLR137vsFL_FUSE
LDLR137vsFL_FUSE <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_FL", "FigS3_LDLR137vsFL_FUSE.csv"))

#FigS3_Indel_analysis
indel_analysis <- read.delim(here("data", "LDLR_FL", "FigS3_Indel_analysis.csv"))

#FigS3_LDLR137muZ
LDLR137vsFL_muZ_sig <- read.csv(here("data", "LDLR_FL", "FigS3_LDLR137muZ.csv"))

BEAN_FUSE_FL <- read_csv(
  here("data", "0326_LDLR_mastersheet.csv")
)
```

```{r fig_S3B}
#FigS3_LDLR-FL RPM table
LDLR_FL_RPM_table <- LDLR_FL_RPM_table %>% select(-"X")

M = cor(LDLR_FL_RPM_table, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "spearman")

LDLR_FL_RPM_table_corrplot <- corrplot(M, method = 'color', col.lim = c(-1,1),
         col = COL2('RdBu'), cl.pos = 'b', addCoef.col = 'white', tl.col = "black")

colnames(M) <- c("Replicate 1 Bulk", "Replicate 1 Top 20%", "Replicate 1 Top 40%", "Replicate 1 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 1 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 2 Bulk", "Replicate 2 Top 20%", "Replicate 2 Top 40%", "Replicate 2 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 2 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 3 Bulk", "Replicate 3 Top 20%", "Replicate 3 Top 40%", "Replicate 3 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 3 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 4 Bulk", "Replicate 4 Top 20%", "Replicate 4 Top 40%", "Replicate 4 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 4 Bottom 40%")

rownames(M) <- c("Replicate 1 Bulk", "Replicate 1 Top 20%", "Replicate 1 Top 40%", "Replicate 1 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 1 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 2 Bulk", "Replicate 2 Top 20%", "Replicate 2 Top 40%", "Replicate 2 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 2 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 3 Bulk", "Replicate 3 Top 20%", "Replicate 3 Top 40%", "Replicate 3 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 3 Bottom 40%", "Replicate 4 Bulk", "Replicate 4 Top 20%", "Replicate 4 Top 40%", "Replicate 4 Bottom 20%", "Replicate 4 Bottom 40%")

fig_S3B <- corrplot(M, method = 'color', col.lim = c(-1,1),
         col = COL2('RdBu'), cl.pos = 'b', addCoef.col = 'white', tl.col = "black")
```

```{r fig_S3C}
# ---- 1) Classic panel theme ----
panel_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 16, color = "black")
  )

df <- indel_analysis %>%
  mutate(
    Outcome = factor(Outcome, levels = c("Edited", "Unedited", "Indel")),
    Fraction = as.numeric(Fraction)
  )

# ---- 2) Plot ----
fig_S3C <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Outcome, y = Fraction)) +
  
  stat_summary(
    aes(fill=Outcome),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "bar",
    color = "black",
    width = 0.6
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.05,
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", after_stat(y))),
    vjust = -0.5,
    size = 5
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 0.8),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fraction of reporter outcomes"
  ) +
  
  panel_theme +
  
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_S3C

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3C.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3C,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S3D}

# Use your panel_theme if it exists, otherwise fallback to theme_classic()
theme_to_use <- if (exists("panel_theme")) panel_theme else theme_classic()

fig_S3D <- ggplot(BEAN_FUSE_FL,
              aes(x = `LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
                  y = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
                  color = "black")) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, alpha = 0.4, size = 2, color = "black") + theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    x = "Endogenous LDLR137-219 BEAN z score",
    color = NULL
  ) +   theme_to_use + theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # y-axis title
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),  # x tick labels
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  ) + coord_equal()

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_S3D

#5193+500 - 5237 = 456 data points 

# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S3D ----
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, method = "pearson", "complete.obs")
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, method = "spearman", "complete.obs")

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`))
 
#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3D.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3D,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S3E}
fig_S3E <- ggplot(BEAN_FUSE_FL,
              aes(x = `LDLR137-219 FUSE_score normalized`,
                  y = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
                  color = "black")) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, alpha = 0.4, size = 2, color = "black") + theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "LDLR-FL FUSE score",
    x = "Endogenous LDLR137-219 FUSE score",
    color = NULL
  ) + theme_to_use + theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # y-axis title
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),  # x tick labels
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  ) + coord_equal()

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_S3E

#16321-15926

# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S3E ----
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 FUSE_score normalized`, method = "pearson", "complete.obs")
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 FUSE_score normalized`, method = "spearman", "complete.obs")

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR137-219 FUSE_score normalized`))

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3E.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3E,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S3F}
#Filter out all points where |z| <= 1.96
df_filtered <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`) > 1.96)

fig_S3F <- ggplot(df_filtered,
              aes(x = `LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
                  y = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
                  color = "black")) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, alpha = 0.4, size = 2, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    x = "Endogenous LDLR137-219 BEAN z score",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_to_use +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  ) +
  coord_equal()

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_S3F

cor(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
    df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs")

cor(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
    df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
    method = "spearman",
    use = "complete.obs")

# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S3F ----
sum(!is.na(df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`))

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3F.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3F,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S3F_alt (UNUSED)}
#Filter out all points where |z| <= 1.96 using LDLR-FL (NOT USED IN PAPER)
df_filtered <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) > 1.96)

fig_S3F_alt <- ggplot(df_filtered,
              aes(x = `LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
                  y = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
                  color = "black")) +
  geom_point(shape = 16, alpha = 0.4, size = 2, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    y = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    x = "Endogenous LDLR137-219 BEAN z score",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_to_use +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  ) +
  coord_equal()

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_S3F_alt

cor(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
    df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs")

cor(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`,
    df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
    method = "spearman",
    use = "complete.obs")

sum(!is.na(df_filtered$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(df_filtered$`LDLR137-219 BEAN mu_Z`))
```


```{r fig_S3G}
#FigS3_LDLRFL BEAN vs PFAM
BEAN_FUSE_FL

# Use your panel_theme if it exists, otherwise fallback to theme_classic()
theme_to_use <- if (exists("panel_theme")) panel_theme else theme_classic()

# Clean + annotate
fig_3G_clean <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  mutate(
    is_cysteine = `Starting AA` == "C",
    Variant_name = paste0(
      `Starting AA`,
      `Position`,
      `Final AA`
    )
  )

# Plot (cysteines in red, others black)
fig_S3G <- ggplot(
  fig_3G_clean,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, y = `Differential PFAM`, color = is_cysteine)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "red", `FALSE` = "black")) +
  labs(
    y = "Differential PFAM",
    x = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_to_use +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  )

#print out figure panel
fig_S3G

#16321-15029

# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S3G ----
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Differential PFAM`, method = "pearson", "complete.obs")
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Differential PFAM`, method = "spearman", "complete.obs")

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Differential PFAM`))
 
#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3G.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3G,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 4,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S3H}
#FigS3_LDLRFL BEAN vs AM
BEAN_FUSE_FL

# Clean + annotate
fig_3H_clean <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  mutate(
    is_cysteine = `Starting AA` == "C",
    Variant_name = paste0(
      `Starting AA`,
      `Position`,
      `Final AA`
    )
  )

# Plot (cysteines in red, others black)
fig_S3H <- ggplot(
  fig_3H_clean,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, y = `AlphaMissense`, color = is_cysteine)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "red", `FALSE` = "black")) +
  labs(
    y = "AlphaMissense",
    x = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_to_use +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black")
  )

#print out figure panel
fig_S3H

#16321-12262
# ---- Calculating correlations for Figure S3H ----
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`, method = "pearson", "complete.obs")
cor(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`, method = "spearman", "complete.obs")

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`))
 
#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3H.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3H,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 4,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r printing_fig S3CDEFGH}
fig_S3CDEFGH <- (fig_S3C + fig_S3D + fig_S3E + plot_layout(widths = c(2, 2, 2))) / (fig_S3F + fig_S3G + fig_S3H+ plot_layout(widths = c(2, 2, 2)))

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S3"), "FigS3CDEFGH.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S3CDEFGH,
  width    = 20,
  height   = 10,
  units    = "in",
  create.dir = TRUE,
  dpi = 600
)
```
